title: licania micrantha
intro: Licania micrantha, also known as the "Pigeon Plum," is a species of flowering plant in the family Chrysobalanaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Licania micrantha include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Licania micrantha can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
